label: experimental/frontier
rq: RQ39: Bootstrap CIs on corrected-router cpWER 1.043
method: Reanalysis only (no Whisper / no ASR run). RQ16's corrected router (lang-id entropy > 0.409 bits -> MIXED, else SEPARATED) applied at two granularities: word-level (stored utterance-level cpWER, matches RQ16 bit-for-bit) and char-level (re-run MeetEval 0.4.3 cpwer/orcwer with ' '.join(list(text)) tokenisation, matches RQ35). Bootstrap 10,000 resamples, seed=42, with percentile CI, BCa CI (jackknife acceleration), and paired-delta CI (corrected - mixed).

thresholds.note: lang_id_entropy threshold 0.409 from RQ13 (>=90% specificity, 94.6% sensitivity). RQ16 showed lang-id alone == full three-guard corrected router on AISHELL-4.

bootstrap.convention: rng.integers(0, n, size=n) per resample (RQ16 verbatim)

rq16_reference.note: RQ16's reported values (PR #909) — word-level must reproduce these.

H39a.statement: Bootstrap 95% CI of corrected-router cpWER excludes always-mixed (word-level 1.17316). Success: upper CI < 1.173.

H39b.statement: Bootstrap 95% CI excludes oracle (word-level 1.01732). Success: lower CI > 1.017.

H39c.statement: Paired bootstrap (per-window corrected minus mixed) CI excludes zero. Success: upper CI < 0.
